name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a focused improvement to SpeakMore
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What should SpeakMore do?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Notes

Does this affect local ASR, cloud ASR, shortcuts, paste behavior, history, packaging, or settings?

## Privacy and Security Notes

Does this send audio/text to a provider, store new data, or expose anything to external tools?
